Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Off Calendar
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Continued To Jun-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ross Madden appeared by zoom for personal representative.

Mr. Madden stated that he believes the cash ($21,000.00) that is in the safe deposit box is community property and that it is the only asset of the estate as the husband had a trust and the decedent had a trust. The court waives the issues with notice and noted that item 7b(3) indicating that no personal property valued at $10,000.00 or more passed to Decedent from her spouse was incorrectly checked. The Court granted the Second Amended Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated December 21, 2010 and the lost codicil dated September 20, 2021 are admitted to probate. Julie Bernard also known as Julia Bernard is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for May 13, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.
